tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block_ubuntu_https_exfil"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set comments "Block outbound HTTPS exfiltration from UbuntuComputer while preserving LAN/ICMP and normal validation traffic"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable

    edit 2
        set name "block_ubuntu_https_exfil"
        set uuid bea63b06-2b59-51f1-df24-46bea292c6ae
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
